revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<kbd class="nowrap button" title="{{{tooltip|This is not a clickable button; it illustrates the button one should find.}}}" style="padding:{{{padTB|.2em}}} {{{padLR|.6em}}}; border:1px solid; border-color:var(--border-color-base, #a2a9b1) var(--border-color-interactive, #72777d) var(--border-color-interactive, #72777d) var(--border-color-base, #a2a9b1); border-radius:3px; background-color: {{{bgcolor|#F2F2F2}}}; color: {{{fgcolor|inherit}}}; {{#if:{{{bgcolor|}}}||background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, {{{bgcolor1|var(--background-color-interactive-subtle, #f8f9fa)}}}, {{{bgcolor2|var(--background-color-interactive, #eaecf0)}}});}} {{#ifeq:{{{format|}}}|bold|font-weight: bold;}} font-family:sans-serif; {{{style|}}}">{{{text|{{{1|Hello, World!}}}}}}</kbd><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Update for dark mode; see talk. All testcases passed nicely.
revision.text:
<kbd class="nowrap button" title="{{{tooltip|This is not a clickable button; it illustrates the button one should find.}}}" style="padding:{{{padTB|.2em}}} {{{padLR|.6em}}}; border:1px solid; border-color:var(--border-color-base, #a2a9b1) var(--border-color-interactive, #72777d) var(--border-color-interactive, #72777d) var(--border-color-base, #a2a9b1); border-radius:3px; background-color: {{{bgcolor|#F2F2F2}}}; color: {{{fgcolor|inherit}}}; {{#if:{{{bgcolor|}}}||background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, {{{bgcolor1|var(--background-color-interactive-subtle, #f8f9fa)}}}, {{{bgcolor2|var(--background-color-interactive, #eaecf0)}}});}} {{#ifeq:{{{format|}}}|bold|font-weight: bold;}} font-family:sans-serif; {{{style|}}}">{{{text|{{{1|Hello, World!}}}}}}</kbd><noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Button here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Button for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <kbd class="nowrap button" title="{{{tooltip|This is not a clickable button; it illustrates the button one should find.}}}" style="padding:{{{padTB|.2em}}} {{{padLR|.6em}}}; border:1px solid; border-color:var(--border-color-base, #a2a9b1) var(--border-color-interactive, #72777d) var(--border-color-interactive, #72777d) var(--border-color-base, #a2a9b1); border-radius:3px; background-color: {{{bgcolor|#F2F2F2}}}; color: {{{fgcolor|inherit}}}; {{#if:{{{bgcolor|}}}||background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, {{{bgcolor1|var(--background-color-interactive-subtle, #f8f9fa)}}}, {{{bgcolor2|var(--background-color-interactive, #eaecf0)}}});}} {{#ifeq:{{{format|}}}|bold|font-weight: bold;}} font-family:sans-serif; {{{style|}}}">{{{text|{{{1|Hello, World!}}}}}}</kbd><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>
